---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a widget, panel, workflow, visual option, or integration
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / use case

<!-- Example: I want the weather widget to show hourly forecast because I use the bar as my main dashboard. -->

## Proposed behavior

<!-- Example: Add an expandable weather panel with the next 12 hours and precipitation chance. -->

## Where should it live?

<!-- Example: new widget, existing control center, theme picker, ArchUpdater panel, AI usage panel. -->

## Configuration idea

<!-- Example: A toggle in Bar Functions: Weather detail mode = compact / detailed. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Example: Use an existing Omarchy helper, a Hyprland rule, or an external tray app instead. -->

## Constraints / acceptance notes

<!-- Optional: performance, accessibility, dependency, fallback, or compatibility expectations. Maintainers will translate this into implementation criteria. -->

## Mockup / example

<!-- Paste a text mockup, screenshot, or link. -->
